column1: 留学を契機に、将来のキャリアが大きく変わった。
column2: りゅうがくをけいきに、しょうらいのきゃりあがおおきくかわった。
column3: Using the study abroad as a turning point, my future career changed significantly.
column4: を契機に (using ~ as a turning point, triggered by, on the occasion of)
column5: Noun + を契機に / を契機として
column6: marks an event that becomes a catalyst or turning point for a subsequent significant change
column8: を契機に = deliberate turning-point catalyst; をきっかけに = as a trigger/opportunity (less formal); を機に = on the occasion of; によって = due to (agent cause)
